results.title: Residents shelter in place for hours after gas leak outside of Los Angeles - Wikinews, the free news source
results.pageTextSample: A gas leak occurred in Castaic, California, in northern Los Angeles County, on Saturday, December 27. More than 14,000 people were required to shelter in place. Interstate 5 was shut down for several hours due to the gas leak, bottlenecking
